final:
module parallel_load_register(
	input clk,
	input rst,
	input load,
	input [15:0] data_in,
	
	output reg [15:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 16'b0000000000000000;
        end else if (load) begin
            q <= data_in;
        end
    end
endmodule
